<style>
/* =====================================================
   VARIABLES
====================================================== */
:root {
  --bg-main: #06111F;
  --bg-sidebar: #071A2D;
  --bg-panel: #0B1D31;
  --bg-panel-soft: #0E243A;
  --bg-card: #0A1B2E;

  --teal: #00B7B0;
  --teal-bright: #8FD9D5;
  --teal-dark: #5EA9A5;

  --yellow: #F7B500;
  --red: #D81E3C;
  --purple: #A78BFA;
  --blue: #3B82F6;

  --text-main: #F4F8FC;
  --text-soft: #C7D6E4;
  --text-muted: #9AAEC3;

  --border-soft: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10);
  --border-strong: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16);
  --border-teal: rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.38);

  --shadow-card: 0 14px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.24);
  --shadow-soft: 0 8px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);

  --sidebar-width: 270px;
  --page-x: 24px;
  --section-gap: 12px;
  --panel-radius: 14px;
  --card-radius: 13px;
}

/* =====================================================
   BASE
====================================================== */
* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html,
body {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  min-height: 100%;
  background: var(--bg-main);
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-family: Inter, Arial, sans-serif;
}

body {
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

button,
select {
  font-family: inherit;
}

.app-shell {
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: flex;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 24% 0%, rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.10), transparent 34%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 82% 5%, rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.08), transparent 28%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #06111F 0%, #08192B 100%);
}

.main-content {
  width: calc(100% - var(--sidebar-width));
  margin-left: var(--sidebar-width);
  min-height: 100vh;
  padding-bottom: 18px;
}

/* =====================================================
   SIDEBAR
====================================================== */
.sidebar {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0 auto 0 0;
  width: var(--sidebar-width);
  min-height: 100vh;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%, rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.14), transparent 32%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #071A2D 0%, #06111F 100%);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  z-index: 30;
}

.sidebar-logo {
  height: 245px;
  padding: 24px 18px 14px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.gold-ball-brand {
  width: 128px;
  height: 128px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
}

.gold-ball-svg {
  width: 128px;
  height: 128px;
  display: block;
}

.sidebar-logo h2 {
  margin: 14px 0 0;
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: 0.9px;
}

.sidebar-logo p {
  margin: 5px 0 0;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.sidebar-menu {
  padding: 10px 14px;
  display: grid;
  gap: 8px;
}

.menu-item {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 46px;
  padding: 0 12px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  border-radius: 11px;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 800;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.18s ease;
}

.menu-item:hover {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.055);
  border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}

.menu-item.active {
  color: var(--text-main);
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.24), rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.08));
  border-color: rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.38);
  box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 var(--teal-bright);
}

.menu-icon {
  width: 27px;
  height: 27px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.045);
  color: currentColor;
}

.menu-icon svg {
  width: 17px;
  height: 17px;
  fill: currentColor;
}

.menu-item strong {
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.sidebar-footer {
  margin-top: auto;
  padding: 18px 16px 20px;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  color: var(--text-muted);
}

.stadium-mark {
  height: 42px;
  display: flex;
  gap: 7px;
  align-items: end;
  justify-content: center;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.stadium-mark div {
  width: 42px;
  border-radius: 50% 50% 0 0;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.28);
  background: rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.07);
}

.stadium-mark div:nth-child(1) {
  height: 24px;
}

.stadium-mark div:nth-child(2) {
  height: 36px;
}

.stadium-mark div:nth-child(3) {
  height: 24px;
}

.sidebar-footer p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-align: center;
}

.sidebar-footer small {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 4px;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 800;
  text-align: center;
}

/* =====================================================
   HEADER
====================================================== */
.hero-header {
  margin: 18px var(--page-x) 0;
  min-height: 188px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 16px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 16% 10%, rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.22), transparent 34%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 84% 0%, rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.16), transparent 32%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, #0B1D31 0%, #0A223A 50%, #081729 100%);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-card);
}

.hero-grid {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: 34px 34px;
  opacity: 0.3;
}

.hero-main {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  padding: 26px 24px;
  height: 100%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 18px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.hero-icon {
  width: 78px;
  height: 78px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  border-radius: 18px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.95), rgba(193, 127, 11, 0.95));
  box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.22);
}

.hero-icon svg {
  width: 49px;
  height: 49px;
  fill: #15110A;
}

.hero-title-block {
  min-width: 0;
}

.hero-title-block h1 {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: clamp(42px, 3vw, 54px);
  line-height: 1;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -1px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.hero-title-block p {
  margin: 9px 0 0;
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 1.45;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.host-text {
  margin-top: 10px;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.host-text span {
  margin-left: 5px;
}

.host-mx,
.host-us,
.host-ca {
  color: var(--text-main);
}

.hero-actions {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 3;
  right: 24px;
  top: 22px;
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  justify-items: end;
}

.update-card {
  min-width: 288px;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: rgba(6, 17, 31, 0.58);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
}

.update-icon {
  width: 38px;
  height: 38px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.14);
  color: var(--teal-bright);
}

.update-icon svg {
  width: 21px;
  height: 21px;
  fill: currentColor;
}

.update-card strong {
  display: block;
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.update-card p {
  margin: 3px 0 0;
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.update-card small {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 2px;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.host-pills {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: 8px;
}

.host-pill {
  min-height: 31px;
  padding: 0 11px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 7px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 900;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
}

.host-pill-mx {
  border-color: rgba(0,183,176,0.30);
}

.host-pill-us {
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.22);
}

.host-pill-ca {
  border-color: rgba(216,30,60,0.35);
}

.hero-ribbons {
  position: absolute;
  right: -58px;
  bottom: 26px;
  width: 360px;
  height: 42px;
  transform: rotate(-18deg);
  opacity: 0.72;
}

.hero-ribbons span {
  display: block;
  height: 12px;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.ribbon-mx {
  background: rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.35);
}

.ribbon-white {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.24);
}

.ribbon-ca {
  background: rgba(216, 30, 60, 0.35);
}

/* =====================================================
   FILTROS
====================================================== */
.filters-panel {
  margin: var(--section-gap) var(--page-x) 0;
  padding: 15px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(14, 36, 58, 0.96), rgba(9, 27, 45, 0.96));
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
}

.section-title {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 11px;
}

.section-icon {
  width: 28px;
  height: 28px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  border-radius: 8px;
  color: var(--teal-bright);
  background: rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.12);
}

.section-icon svg {
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  fill: currentColor;
}

.section-title h3 {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.filters-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(160px, 1fr)) 160px;
  gap: 10px;
  align-items: end;
}

.filter-box label {
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.65px;
}

.filter-box select {
  width: 100%;
  height: 40px;
  padding: 0 11px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: #071729;
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 800;
  outline: none;
}

.filter-box select:focus {
  border-color: rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.62);
}

.reset-button {
  height: 40px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.38);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.12);
  color: var(--yellow);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 900;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.reset-button svg {
  width: 15px;
  height: 15px;
  fill: currentColor;
}

/* =====================================================
   GLOBAL PANELS / TABLAS / LOADER
====================================================== */
.dashboard-view {
  display: none;
}

.dashboard-view.active-view {
  display: block;
}

.layout-fit-screen {
  height: auto;
  min-height: auto;
  overflow: visible;
}

.dashboard-view.active-view.layout-fit-screen {
  height: auto;
  min-height: auto;
  overflow: visible;
}

.panel {
  min-height: 340px;
  padding: 16px;
  border-radius: var(--panel-radius);
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(14, 36, 58, 0.96), rgba(9, 27, 45, 0.96));
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-card);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.panel-header {
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.panel-header h3 {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1.25;
}

.panel-header p {
  margin: 5px 0 0;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 750;
  line-height: 1.35;
}

.panel canvas {
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 280px !important;
}

.dashboard-grid {
  margin: var(--section-gap) var(--page-x) 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--section-gap);
}

.table-wrapper {
  margin-top: 12px;
  max-height: 320px;
  overflow: auto;
  border-radius: 9px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
}

table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--text-main);
}

thead {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 2;
}

th {
  padding: 10px 8px;
  background: #071729;
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 11px;
  text-align: left;
  white-space: nowrap;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  font-weight: 900;
}

td {
  padding: 9px 8px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 750;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

tbody tr:hover {
  background: rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.06);
}

.empty-table-row td {
  padding: 24px 14px;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  text-align: center;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.footer {
  min-height: 54px;
  margin: var(--section-gap) var(--page-x) 0;
  padding: 12px 18px;
  background: rgba(4, 16, 29, 0.92);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  border-radius: 12px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 12px;
  align-items: center;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.footer div:nth-child(2) {
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--text-soft);
}

.footer div:nth-child(3) {
  text-align: right;
}

.loader {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 9999;
  background: rgba(6, 17, 31, 0.96);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.loader.hidden {
  display: none;
}

.spinner {
  width: 44px;
  height: 44px;
  border: 4px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
  border-top-color: var(--teal-bright);
  border-radius: 50%;
  animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite;
}

.loader p {
  margin-top: 14px;
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-weight: 900;
}

@keyframes spin {
  to {
    transform: rotate(360deg);
  }
}

/* =====================================================
   TAB 1: RESUMEN HISTÓRICO
====================================================== */
.kpi-strip {
  margin: var(--section-gap) var(--page-x) 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(8, minmax(130px, 1fr));
  gap: var(--section-gap);
}

.kpi-card {
  min-height: 112px;
  padding: 15px 13px;
  display: flex;
  gap: 12px;
  align-items: center;
  border-radius: var(--card-radius);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(14, 36, 58, 0.95), rgba(9, 27, 45, 0.96));
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-card);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.kpi-card::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: auto 0 0 0;
  height: 3px;
  opacity: 0.85;
}

.kpi-card.accent-teal::after {
  background: var(--teal-bright);
}

.kpi-card.accent-yellow::after {
  background: var(--yellow);
}

.kpi-card.accent-red::after {
  background: var(--red);
}

.kpi-card.accent-discipline::after {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--yellow), var(--red));
}

.kpi-icon {
  width: 44px;
  height: 44px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.045);
  color: var(--teal-bright);
}

.accent-yellow .kpi-icon {
  color: var(--yellow);
}

.accent-red .kpi-icon {
  color: var(--red);
}

.accent-discipline .kpi-icon {
  color: var(--yellow);
}

.kpi-icon svg {
  width: 25px;
  height: 25px;
  fill: currentColor;
}

.cards-stack-icon svg {
  width: 33px;
  height: 33px;
}

.card-red {
  fill: var(--red);
  transform: rotate(7deg);
  transform-origin: center;
}

.card-yellow {
  fill: var(--yellow);
  transform: rotate(-7deg);
  transform-origin: center;
}

.kpi-card p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1.25;
}

.kpi-card h2 {
  margin: 7px 0 5px;
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 30px;
  line-height: 1;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.kpi-card small {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.top-grid {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.bottom-grid {
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.25fr 1fr;
}

.phase-panel,
.ranking-panel,
.players-panel {
  min-height: 360px;
}

.phase-panel canvas,
.players-panel canvas {
  height: 300px !important;
}

.ranking-panel .table-wrapper {
  max-height: 300px;
}

/* =====================================================
   TAB 2: SELECCIONES
====================================================== */
.selection-profile-panel {
  margin: var(--section-gap) var(--page-x) 0;
  padding: 18px 20px;
  min-height: 126px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, 1.1fr) minmax(260px, 0.75fr) minmax(380px, 1.5fr);
  gap: 22px;
  align-items: center;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 0% 0%, rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.10), transparent 28%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(14, 36, 58, 0.95), rgba(8, 26, 44, 0.96));
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  border-radius: var(--panel-radius);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-card);
}

.selection-profile-left {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 18px;
}

.selection-profile-flag {
  width: 96px;
  height: 66px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 35% 30%, rgba(0, 210, 199, 0.20), transparent 45%),
    rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.045);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.36);
  font-size: 44px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.eyebrow,
.selection-profile-title .eyebrow,
.selection-achievements-header .eyebrow {
  margin: 0 0 5px;
  color: var(--yellow);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.8px;
}

.selection-profile-title h2 {
  margin: 0 0 8px;
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 36px;
  line-height: 1;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.selection-conf-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  min-height: 29px;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0 12px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.14);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.38);
  color: var(--teal-bright);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.selection-profile-metrics {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  border-left: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
}

.selection-profile-metric {
  min-height: 74px;
  padding: 8px 18px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
}

.selection-profile-metric + .selection-profile-metric {
  border-left: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
}

.selection-profile-metric span {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 800;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.selection-profile-metric strong {
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.selection-profile-summary {
  padding: 13px 15px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.052);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10);
}

.selection-profile-summary h3 {
  margin: 0 0 8px;
  color: var(--yellow);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.selection-profile-summary p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.58;
  font-weight: 760;
}

.selection-achievements-panel {
  margin: var(--section-gap) var(--page-x) 0;
  padding: 16px 18px;
  border-radius: var(--panel-radius);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 5% 0%, rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.10), transparent 28%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(14, 36, 58, 0.96), rgba(9, 27, 45, 0.96));
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-card);
}

.selection-achievements-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 16px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.selection-achievements-header h3 {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 17px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.selection-achievements-scope {
  min-height: 30px;
  padding: 0 12px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 900;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.045);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10);
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.selection-achievements-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(160px, 1fr));
  gap: 10px;
}

.achievement-card {
  min-height: 104px;
  padding: 14px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  border-radius: var(--card-radius);
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(10, 31, 52, 0.96), rgba(7, 23, 41, 0.96));
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.09);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.achievement-card::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: auto 0 0 0;
  height: 3px;
}

.champion-achievement::after {
  background: var(--yellow);
}

.finalist-achievement::after {
  background: #CBD5E1;
}

.semifinal-achievement::after {
  background: var(--purple);
}

.best-achievement::after {
  background: var(--teal-bright);
}

.achievement-icon {
  width: 44px;
  height: 44px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  font-size: 23px;
}

.achievement-card p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.achievement-card h4 {
  margin: 6px 0 4px;
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 19px;
  line-height: 1.15;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.achievement-card small {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.selection-kpi-grid,
.selection-kpi-grid-compact {
  margin: var(--section-gap) var(--page-x) 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(6, minmax(140px, 1fr));
  gap: var(--section-gap);
}

.selection-kpi-card {
  min-height: 106px;
  padding: 14px 12px;
  display: flex;
  gap: 12px;
  align-items: center;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(14, 36, 58, 0.95), rgba(9, 27, 45, 0.95));
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  border-radius: var(--card-radius);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-card);
}

.selection-kpi-icon {
  width: 42px;
  height: 42px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  border-radius: 11px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.045);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.selection-kpi-icon svg {
  width: 25px;
  height: 25px;
  fill: currentColor;
}

.selection-kpi-icon.teal-icon {
  color: var(--teal-bright);
}

.selection-kpi-icon.gold-icon {
  color: var(--yellow);
}

.selection-kpi-icon.gray-icon {
  color: #B8C4D4;
}

.selection-kpi-icon.purple-icon {
  color: #A78BFA;
}

.selection-kpi-card p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.selection-kpi-card h2 {
  margin: 7px 0 5px;
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 30px;
  line-height: 1;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.selection-kpi-card small {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.selection-analysis-grid {
  margin: var(--section-gap) var(--page-x) 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.45fr 0.85fr;
  gap: var(--section-gap);
}

.selection-performance-panel,
.selection-result-panel {
  min-height: 380px;
}

.selection-performance-panel canvas,
.selection-result-panel canvas {
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 310px !important;
}

.selection-detail-grid {
  margin: var(--section-gap) var(--page-x) 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.15fr 1fr;
  gap: var(--section-gap);
}

.selection-best-editions-panel,
.selection-players-panel {
  min-height: 360px;
}

.selection-table-wrapper {
  max-height: 300px;
}

.selection-table-wrapper table {
  font-size: 12px;
}

.selection-table-wrapper th {
  font-size: 11px;
}

.selection-table-wrapper td {
  font-size: 12px;
}

.selection-best-editions-panel tbody tr:first-child td {
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-weight: 900;
}

.selection-best-editions-panel tbody tr:first-child td:nth-child(2),
.selection-best-editions-panel tbody tr:first-child td:nth-child(4) {
  color: var(--yellow);
}

/* =====================================================
   TABS PLACEHOLDER
====================================================== */
.coming-soon-panel {
  margin: var(--section-gap) var(--page-x) 0;
  padding: 28px;
  min-height: 260px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  border-radius: var(--panel-radius);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 0% 0%, rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.12), transparent 30%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(14, 36, 58, 0.96), rgba(9, 27, 45, 0.96));
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-card);
}

.coming-soon-panel .eyebrow {
  margin: 0 0 5px;
  color: var(--yellow);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.8px;
}

.coming-soon-panel h2 {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 34px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.coming-soon-panel p:not(.eyebrow) {
  margin: 8px 0 0;
  max-width: 680px;
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 1.5;
  font-weight: 700;
}

/* =====================================================
   PREDICCIÓN 2026 - MODO ESPECIAL
====================================================== */
body.prediction-mode {
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
  overflow-y: auto !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .hero-header,
body.prediction-mode .filters-panel,
body.prediction-mode .footer {
  display: none !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .main-content {
  height: auto !important;
  max-height: none !important;
  min-height: 100vh !important;
  padding: 12px 0 18px !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .sidebar-logo {
  height: 126px !important;
  padding: 22px 18px 12px !important;
  align-items: flex-start !important;
  justify-content: center !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .gold-ball-brand {
  display: none !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .sidebar-logo h2 {
  margin: 0 !important;
  font-size: 23px !important;
  line-height: 1.05 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.4px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .sidebar-logo p {
  margin-top: 6px !important;
  color: var(--teal-bright) !important;
  font-size: 11px !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  letter-spacing: 1px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .sidebar-footer {
  padding: 14px 16px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .stadium-mark {
  display: none !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .sidebar-footer p,
body.prediction-mode .sidebar-footer small {
  text-align: left !important;
}

/* =====================================================
   PREDICCIÓN 2026 - CONTENEDOR GENERAL
====================================================== */
.prediction-2026-view,
.prediction-full-tournament-view {
  margin: var(--section-gap) var(--page-x) 0;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-tournament-view {
  margin: 0 16px !important;
  height: auto !important;
  max-height: none !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-rows: auto auto !important;
  gap: 10px !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-header {
  min-height: 68px !important;
  padding: 10px 14px !important;
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  justify-content: space-between !important;
  gap: 16px !important;
  border-radius: 14px !important;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 0% 0%, rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.16), transparent 30%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 86% 0%, rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.12), transparent 28%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(10, 31, 52, 0.98), rgba(6, 17, 31, 0.98)) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.32) !important;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-card) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-title {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  gap: 12px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-icon {
  width: 44px !important;
  height: 44px !important;
  display: grid !important;
  place-items: center !important;
  flex-shrink: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 13px !important;
  background: rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.13) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.30) !important;
  font-size: 24px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-title h2 {
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: var(--text-main) !important;
  font-size: 28px !important;
  line-height: 1 !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.4px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-title p {
  margin: 5px 0 0 !important;
  color: var(--text-soft) !important;
  font-size: 12px !important;
  line-height: 1.2 !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-run-card {
  min-width: 230px !important;
  padding: 8px 12px !important;
  display: grid !important;
  gap: 3px !important;
  border-radius: 11px !important;
  background: rgba(6, 17, 31, 0.62) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.24) !important;
  box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 var(--teal-bright) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-run-card span {
  color: var(--text-muted) !important;
  font-size: 10px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.7px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-run-card strong {
  color: var(--text-main) !important;
  font-size: 12px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
}

/* =====================================================
   PREDICCIÓN 2026 - BOARD
====================================================== */
body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-board {
  height: auto !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  max-height: none !important;
  padding: 12px !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-rows: auto auto auto !important;
  gap: 10px !important;
  border-radius: 16px !important;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 0% 0%, rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.10), transparent 30%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(14, 36, 58, 0.96), rgba(7, 22, 39, 0.98)) !important;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft) !important;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-card) !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-board-heading {
  min-height: 0 !important;
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  justify-content: space-between !important;
  gap: 14px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-board-heading .eyebrow {
  margin: 0 0 3px !important;
  color: var(--yellow) !important;
  font-size: 10px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.8px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-board-heading h3 {
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: var(--text-main) !important;
  font-size: 20px !important;
  line-height: 1.05 !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-board-legend {
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  flex-wrap: wrap !important;
  justify-content: flex-end !important;
  gap: 8px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-board-legend span {
  min-height: 24px !important;
  padding: 0 8px !important;
  display: inline-flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  gap: 6px !important;
  border-radius: 999px !important;
  color: var(--text-soft) !important;
  font-size: 10px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.045) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .legend-dot {
  width: 7px !important;
  height: 7px !important;
  display: inline-block !important;
  border-radius: 50% !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .legend-qualified {
  background: var(--teal-bright) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .legend-playoff {
  background: var(--yellow) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .legend-winner {
  background: #FFFFFF !important;
}

/* =====================================================
   PREDICCIÓN 2026 - LAYOUT TORNEO
====================================================== */
body.prediction-mode .prediction-tournament-layout {
  min-height: 760px !important;
  height: auto !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: 210px minmax(0, 1fr) 210px !important;
  gap: 10px !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

/* =====================================================
   PREDICCIÓN 2026 - GRUPOS LATERALES
====================================================== */
body.prediction-mode .prediction-groups-side {
  min-height: 0 !important;
  height: 760px !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-rows: 34px minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
  gap: 7px !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-side-title {
  min-height: 0 !important;
  padding: 7px 9px !important;
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  justify-content: space-between !important;
  gap: 8px !important;
  border-radius: 10px !important;
  background: rgba(6, 17, 31, 0.60) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.20) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-side-title span {
  color: var(--text-muted) !important;
  font-size: 9px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-side-title strong {
  color: var(--text-main) !important;
  font-size: 11px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-groups-grid {
  min-height: 0 !important;
  height: 100% !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-rows: repeat(6, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  gap: 6px !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-group-card {
  min-height: 0 !important;
  padding: 6px !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-rows: 22px minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
  gap: 4px !important;
  border-radius: 10px !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(10, 31, 52, 0.92), rgba(6, 20, 36, 0.96)) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.085) !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-group-header {
  min-height: 0 !important;
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  justify-content: space-between !important;
  gap: 8px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-group-header strong {
  color: var(--teal-bright) !important;
  font-size: 11px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-group-header span {
  color: var(--text-muted) !important;
  font-size: 9px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-group-table {
  min-height: 0 !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-rows: 16px repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  gap: 2px !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-group-row {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 5px !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: 16px minmax(0, 1fr) 24px 24px !important;
  gap: 4px !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  border-radius: 6px !important;
  color: var(--text-soft) !important;
  font-size: 9.5px !important;
  font-weight: 850 !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-group-head {
  color: var(--text-muted) !important;
  font-size: 8px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  background: transparent !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-group-row.is-qualified {
  background: rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.10) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.22) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-group-row.is-third-qualified {
  background: rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.10) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.24) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-group-row.is-eliminated {
  opacity: 0.72 !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-group-team {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: 18px minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
  gap: 4px !important;
  align-items: center !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-group-team i {
  font-style: normal !important;
  font-size: 13px !important;
  line-height: 1 !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-group-team strong {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  text-overflow: ellipsis !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  color: inherit !important;
  font-size: 9.5px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-group-empty,
body.prediction-mode .prediction-loading-card {
  min-height: 70px !important;
  display: grid !important;
  place-items: center !important;
  color: var(--text-muted) !important;
  font-size: 11px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  border-radius: 10px !important;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.035) !important;
  border: 1px dashed rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14) !important;
}

/* =====================================================
   PREDICCIÓN 2026 - ÁREA CENTRAL DE LLAVE
====================================================== */
body.prediction-mode .prediction-bracket-full-area {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  min-height: 760px !important;
  height: auto !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-rows: minmax(0, 1fr) 58px !important;
  gap: 8px !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-full-top-labels {
  display: none !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-bracket-full {
  height: auto !important;
  min-height: 700px !important;
  max-height: none !important;
  overflow-x: auto !important;
  overflow-y: hidden !important;
  padding: 12px !important;
  border-radius: 16px !important;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 43%, rgba(143, 217, 213, 0.10), transparent 33%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(4, 18, 32, 0.96), rgba(3, 15, 27, 0.98)) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(143, 217, 213, 0.16) !important;
}

/* =====================================================
   LLAVE TIPO ÁRBOL - NUEVO SCRIPT
====================================================== */
body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-board {
  position: relative !important;
  min-width: 1180px !important;
  height: 690px !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 250px minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
  gap: 16px !important;
  align-items: stretch !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-board::before {
  content: "" !important;
  position: absolute !important;
  top: 10px !important;
  bottom: 10px !important;
  left: 50% !important;
  width: 1px !important;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(143, 217, 213, 0.28), transparent) !important;
  opacity: .85 !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-side {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  height: 100% !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-rows: 28px 22px minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
  gap: 7px !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-side-title,
body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-center-title {
  height: 28px !important;
  display: grid !important;
  place-items: center !important;
  border-radius: 10px !important;
  color: var(--text-main) !important;
  font-size: 10px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  letter-spacing: .55px !important;
  background: rgba(6, 17, 31, .62) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(143, 217, 213, .20) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-center-title {
  color: var(--yellow) !important;
  background: rgba(247, 181, 0, .10) !important;
  border-color: rgba(247, 181, 0, .24) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-labels {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  height: 22px !important;
  display: grid !important;
  gap: 7px !important;
  align-items: center !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-labels-left {
  grid-template-columns: 1.18fr 1.06fr .96fr .88fr !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-labels-right {
  grid-template-columns: .88fr .96fr 1.06fr 1.18fr !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-labels span {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  height: 22px !important;
  display: grid !important;
  place-items: center !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  text-overflow: ellipsis !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  border-radius: 8px !important;
  color: rgba(244, 248, 252, .86) !important;
  font-size: 8.6px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  letter-spacing: .35px !important;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.035) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.075) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-grid {
  position: relative !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  height: 100% !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-rows: repeat(16, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  column-gap: 10px !important;
  row-gap: 0 !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-grid-left {
  grid-template-columns: 1.18fr 1.06fr .96fr .88fr !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-grid-right {
  grid-template-columns: .88fr .96fr 1.06fr 1.18fr !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-grid::before {
  content: "" !important;
  position: absolute !important;
  inset: 0 !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 24%, rgba(143,217,213,.08) 24%, rgba(143,217,213,.08) calc(24% + 1px), transparent calc(24% + 1px)),
    linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 49%, rgba(143,217,213,.08) 49%, rgba(143,217,213,.08) calc(49% + 1px), transparent calc(49% + 1px)),
    linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 74%, rgba(143,217,213,.08) 74%, rgba(143,217,213,.08) calc(74% + 1px), transparent calc(74% + 1px)) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-cell {
  position: relative !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  z-index: 2 !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-cell-left {
  justify-content: stretch !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-cell-right {
  justify-content: stretch !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-cell.has-target-connector::before,
body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-cell.has-source-connector::after {
  content: "" !important;
  position: absolute !important;
  top: 50% !important;
  height: 2px !important;
  width: 11px !important;
  background: rgba(143, 217, 213, .48) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(143, 217, 213, .20) !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
  z-index: 1 !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-cell-left.has-target-connector::before {
  right: -11px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-cell-left.has-source-connector::after {
  left: -11px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-cell-right.has-target-connector::before {
  left: -11px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-cell-right.has-source-connector::after {
  right: -11px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .tree-round-r32.has-source-connector::after {
  display: none !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .tree-round-semis.has-target-connector::before {
  background: rgba(247, 181, 0, .58) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-empty-state {
  grid-column: 1 / -1 !important;
  grid-row: 1 / -1 !important;
  display: grid !important;
  place-items: center !important;
  color: var(--text-muted) !important;
  font-size: 12px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  border-radius: 14px !important;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.035) !important;
  border: 1px dashed rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14) !important;
}

/* =====================================================
   TARJETAS DE PARTIDO - NUEVA LLAVE
====================================================== */
body.prediction-mode .prediction-match-node {
  position: relative !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  min-height: 78px !important;
  padding: 6px 7px !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-rows: auto auto auto auto !important;
  gap: 4px !important;
  border-radius: 10px !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(10, 31, 52, .98), rgba(5, 18, 32, .98)) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, .10) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, .22) !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  z-index: 3 !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .tree-match-r32 {
  min-height: 64px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .tree-match-octavos {
  min-height: 74px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .tree-match-cuartos {
  min-height: 84px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .tree-match-semis {
  min-height: 94px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-match-node-meta {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  justify-content: space-between !important;
  gap: 6px !important;
  color: var(--text-muted) !important;
  font-size: 9px !important;
  line-height: 1 !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .match-node-round {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  text-overflow: ellipsis !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  color: #DDEBFA !important;
  font-size: 9px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  letter-spacing: .25px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .confidence-badge {
  max-width: 54px !important;
  padding: 2px 6px !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  text-overflow: ellipsis !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  border-radius: 999px !important;
  font-size: 8px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  line-height: 1 !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10) !important;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.045) !important;
  color: var(--text-soft) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .confidence-badge.conf-alta {
  color: var(--teal-bright) !important;
  border-color: rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.34) !important;
  background: rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.10) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .confidence-badge.conf-media {
  color: var(--yellow) !important;
  border-color: rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.34) !important;
  background: rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.09) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .confidence-badge.conf-baja {
  color: #CBD5E1 !important;
  border-color: rgba(203, 213, 225, 0.22) !important;
  background: rgba(203, 213, 225, 0.055) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-node-team {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  min-height: 20px !important;
  padding: 3px 5px !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: 18px minmax(0, 1fr) 31px 18px !important;
  gap: 4px !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  border-radius: 7px !important;
  color: var(--text-soft) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-node-team.is-winner {
  color: var(--text-main) !important;
  background: rgba(0, 183, 176, .15) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 183, 176, .33) !important;
  box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 var(--teal-bright) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-node-flag {
  font-size: 13px !important;
  line-height: 1 !important;
  text-align: center !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-node-name {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  text-overflow: ellipsis !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  color: inherit !important;
  font-size: 9.5px !important;
  line-height: 1.05 !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-node-seed {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  min-height: 14px !important;
  padding: 1px 4px !important;
  display: grid !important;
  place-items: center !important;
  border-radius: 999px !important;
  color: var(--yellow) !important;
  background: rgba(247, 181, 0, .09) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(247, 181, 0, .20) !important;
  font-size: 7px !important;
  font-style: normal !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  line-height: 1 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-node-score {
  color: var(--yellow) !important;
  font-size: 10px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  text-align: right !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .match-node-winner {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  min-height: 18px !important;
  padding-top: 3px !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
  gap: 4px !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, .08) !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .match-node-winner span {
  color: var(--text-muted) !important;
  font-size: 7.5px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .match-node-winner strong {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  text-overflow: ellipsis !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  color: var(--teal-bright) !important;
  font-size: 8.5px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .empty-match-node {
  opacity: .56 !important;
  border-style: dashed !important;
}

/* =====================================================
   CENTRO - FINAL / TERCER LUGAR
====================================================== */
body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-center {
  position: relative !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  height: 100% !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-rows: 28px minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
  gap: 7px !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-center::before {
  content: "" !important;
  position: absolute !important;
  top: 36px !important;
  bottom: 18px !important;
  left: 50% !important;
  width: 1px !important;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(247, 181, 0, .42), rgba(143, 217, 213, .28), transparent) !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-final-stack {
  position: relative !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  height: 100% !important;
  display: grid !important;
  align-content: center !important;
  gap: 14px !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .final-node,
body.prediction-mode .tree-final-node {
  min-height: 118px !important;
  border-color: rgba(247, 181, 0, .62) !important;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%, rgba(247, 181, 0, .18), transparent 42%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(16, 42, 68, .99), rgba(6, 17, 31, .99)) !important;
  box-shadow:
    0 12px 28px rgba(0, 0, 0, .30),
    inset 0 -3px 0 rgba(247, 181, 0, .86) !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .third-place-node,
body.prediction-mode .tree-third-node {
  min-height: 106px !important;
  border-color: rgba(143, 217, 213, .28) !important;
}

/* =====================================================
   CAJA CAMPEÓN
====================================================== */
body.prediction-mode .prediction-champion-box {
  min-height: 58px !important;
  height: 58px !important;
  padding: 8px 12px !important;
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  gap: 12px !important;
  border-radius: 14px !important;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 0% 0%, rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.18), transparent 34%),
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(14, 36, 58, 0.96), rgba(6, 17, 31, 0.96)) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.38) !important;
  box-shadow:
    0 10px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.20),
    inset 3px 0 0 var(--yellow) !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .champion-box-trophy {
  width: 40px !important;
  height: 40px !important;
  display: grid !important;
  place-items: center !important;
  flex-shrink: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 12px !important;
  background: rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.13) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.26) !important;
  font-size: 24px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-champion-box p {
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: var(--yellow) !important;
  font-size: 10px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.65px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-champion-box h3 {
  margin: 3px 0 2px !important;
  color: var(--text-main) !important;
  font-size: 22px !important;
  line-height: 1 !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-champion-box small {
  color: var(--text-soft) !important;
  font-size: 10px !important;
  font-weight: 850 !important;
}

/* =====================================================
   NOTA INFERIOR
====================================================== */
body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-note {
  min-height: 38px !important;
  padding: 8px 10px !important;
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  gap: 8px !important;
  border-radius: 11px !important;
  background: rgba(6, 17, 31, 0.54) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-note span {
  color: var(--teal-bright) !important;
  font-size: 14px !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-note p {
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: var(--text-soft) !important;
  font-size: 11px !important;
  line-height: 1.2 !important;
  font-weight: 750 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  text-overflow: ellipsis !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
}

/* =====================================================
   RESPONSIVE GENERAL
====================================================== */
@media (max-width: 1800px) {
  .kpi-strip {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(150px, 1fr));
  }

  .top-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .bottom-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .selection-kpi-grid,
  .selection-kpi-grid-compact {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(160px, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 1500px) {
  :root {
    --page-x: 20px;
    --section-gap: 11px;
  }

  .hero-header {
    min-height: 180px;
  }

  .hero-title-block h1 {
    font-size: 42px;
  }

  .hero-title-block p {
    font-size: 14px;
  }

  .update-card {
    min-width: 260px;
  }

  .filters-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  }

  .reset-button {
    grid-column: span 2;
  }

  .selection-profile-panel {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .selection-profile-metrics {
    border-left: none;
    border-right: none;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  }

  .selection-analysis-grid,
  .selection-detail-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 1450px) {
  body.prediction-mode:not(.fullscreen-layout) .prediction-bracket-full {
    overflow-x: auto !important;
  }

  body.prediction-mode:not(.fullscreen-layout) .bracket-tree-board {
    min-width: 1180px !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 1250px) {
  .hero-header {
    min-height: 250px;
  }

  .hero-actions {
    position: relative;
    right: auto;
    top: auto;
    padding: 0 24px 22px;
    justify-items: start;
  }

  .update-card {
    width: 100%;
  }

  .host-pills {
    justify-content: flex-start;
  }

  .selection-achievements-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  }

  .prediction-board-heading {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start !important;
  }

  body.prediction-mode .prediction-tournament-layout {
    min-width: 1180px !important;
  }

  body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-board {
    overflow-x: auto !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 1100px) {
  .kpi-strip,
  .selection-kpi-grid,
  .selection-kpi-grid-compact {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(160px, 1fr));
  }

  .top-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .panel,
  .phase-panel,
  .ranking-panel,
  .players-panel,
  .selection-performance-panel,
  .selection-result-panel,
  .selection-best-editions-panel,
  .selection-players-panel {
    min-height: 360px;
  }

  .panel canvas,
  .phase-panel canvas,
  .players-panel canvas,
  .selection-performance-panel canvas,
  .selection-result-panel canvas {
    height: 290px !important;
  }

  body.prediction-mode .main-content {
    height: auto !important;
    max-height: none !important;
    overflow: auto !important;
  }

  body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-tournament-view {
    height: auto !important;
    max-height: none !important;
    overflow: visible !important;
  }

  body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-board {
    min-height: 760px !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  :root {
    --page-x: 14px;
    --section-gap: 10px;
    --sidebar-width: 100%;
  }

  .app-shell {
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .sidebar {
    position: static;
    width: 100%;
    min-height: auto;
  }

  .sidebar-logo {
    height: 170px;
  }

  .gold-ball-brand,
  .gold-ball-svg {
    width: 96px;
    height: 96px;
  }

  .sidebar-menu {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .sidebar-footer {
    display: none;
  }

  .main-content {
    margin-left: 0;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .hero-header {
    min-height: auto;
  }

  .hero-main {
    padding: 18px;
    gap: 14px;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }

  .hero-title-block h1 {
    font-size: 34px;
    white-space: normal;
  }

  .hero-title-block p {
    font-size: 14px;
  }

  .hero-icon {
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
  }

  .hero-icon svg {
    width: 38px;
    height: 38px;
  }

  .hero-actions {
    padding: 0 18px 18px;
  }

  .host-pills {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .host-pill {
    width: 100%;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .filters-grid,
  .kpi-strip,
  .selection-kpi-grid,
  .selection-kpi-grid-compact,
  .selection-achievements-grid,
  .top-grid,
  .bottom-grid,
  .footer {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .reset-button {
    grid-column: span 1;
  }

  .selection-profile-left {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }

  .selection-profile-title h2 {
    font-size: 30px;
  }

  .selection-profile-metrics {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .selection-profile-metric + .selection-profile-metric {
    border-left: none;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  }

  .footer {
    height: auto;
    padding: 12px;
  }

  .footer div,
  .footer div:nth-child(2),
  .footer div:nth-child(3) {
    text-align: left;
  }

  body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-tournament-view {
    margin: 0 14px !important;
  }
}


/* =====================================================
   ENCABEZADOS ESTANDARIZADOS - LOGO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026
   - Mismo emblema visual en histórico, predicción inicial y predicción viva.
   - Conserva las reglas especiales de fullscreen definidas más abajo.
===================================================== */
.world-cup-26-logo,
body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-header.dashboard-standard-header--prediction .prediction-full-icon.world-cup-26-logo {
  background:
    transparent
    url("data:image/png;base64,")
    center / contain
    no-repeat !important;
  color: transparent !important;
  font-size: 0 !important;
}

.hero-header.dashboard-standard-header,
body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-header.dashboard-standard-header {
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.30) !important;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 8% 10%, rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.17), transparent 32%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 88% 0%, rgba(247, 181, 0, 0.10), transparent 30%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, #0B1D31 0%, #0A223A 52%, #081729 100%) !important;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-card) !important;
}

/* Encabezado histórico */
.hero-header.dashboard-standard-header--hero {
  min-height: 188px;
}

.hero-header.dashboard-standard-header--hero .hero-main {
  padding: 20px 24px;
  gap: 24px;
}

.hero-header.dashboard-standard-header--hero .hero-icon.world-cup-26-logo {
  width: 118px;
  height: 146px;
  min-width: 118px;
  flex: 0 0 118px;
  border: 0;
  border-radius: 0;
  box-shadow: none;
}

.hero-header.dashboard-standard-header--hero .hero-title-block h1 {
  font-size: clamp(44px, 3.6vw, 60px);
  line-height: 0.98;
}

.hero-header.dashboard-standard-header--hero .hero-title-block p {
  margin-top: 11px;
  font-size: 16px;
}

/* Encabezados de ambas predicciones */
body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-header.dashboard-standard-header--prediction {
  min-height: 104px !important;
  padding: 11px 18px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-header.dashboard-standard-header--prediction .prediction-full-title {
  gap: 16px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-header.dashboard-standard-header--prediction .prediction-full-icon.world-cup-26-logo {
  width: 66px !important;
  height: 80px !important;
  min-width: 66px !important;
  flex: 0 0 66px !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-header.dashboard-standard-header--prediction .prediction-full-title h2 {
  font-size: 32px !important;
  line-height: 1.02 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.35px !important;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-header.dashboard-standard-header--prediction .prediction-full-title p {
  margin-top: 7px !important;
  font-size: 13px !important;
  line-height: 1.25 !important;
}

/* Tarjetas de información derechas */
.dashboard-header-info-card,
body.prediction-mode .dashboard-header-info-card {
  min-width: 278px !important;
  padding: 11px 14px !important;
  border-radius: 13px !important;
  background: rgba(6, 17, 31, 0.68) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 183, 176, 0.30) !important;
  box-shadow: inset 4px 0 0 var(--teal-bright) !important;
}

.hero-header .update-card.dashboard-header-info-card {
  display: flex;
}

body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-run-card.dashboard-header-info-card {
  display: grid !important;
}

/* Ajustes normales para pantallas medianas */
@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  .hero-header.dashboard-standard-header--hero .hero-icon.world-cup-26-logo {
    width: 96px;
    height: 120px;
    min-width: 96px;
    flex-basis: 96px;
  }

  .hero-header.dashboard-standard-header--hero .hero-title-block h1 {
    font-size: 43px;
  }

  .dashboard-header-info-card,
  body.prediction-mode .dashboard-header-info-card {
    min-width: 230px !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  .hero-header.dashboard-standard-header--hero {
    min-height: auto;
  }

  .hero-header.dashboard-standard-header--hero .hero-main {
    align-items: flex-start;
  }

  .hero-header.dashboard-standard-header--hero .hero-icon.world-cup-26-logo {
    width: 74px;
    height: 92px;
    min-width: 74px;
    flex-basis: 74px;
  }

  .hero-header.dashboard-standard-header--hero .hero-title-block h1 {
    font-size: 36px;
    white-space: normal;
  }

  body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-header.dashboard-standard-header--prediction {
    min-height: auto !important;
    align-items: flex-start !important;
  }

  body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-header.dashboard-standard-header--prediction .prediction-full-icon.world-cup-26-logo {
    width: 52px !important;
    height: 64px !important;
    min-width: 52px !important;
    flex-basis: 52px !important;
  }

  body.prediction-mode .prediction-full-header.dashboard-standard-header--prediction .prediction-full-title h2 {
    font-size: 24px !important;
  }

  .dashboard-header-info-card,
  body.prediction-mode .dashboard-header-info-card {
    min-width: 0 !important;
    width: 100% !important;
  }
}

/* =====================================================
   FULLSCREEN GENERAL
====================================================== */
@media (min-width: 1200px) and (min-height: 760px) {
  html.fullscreen-layout,
  body.fullscreen-layout {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100vh !important;
    max-height: 100vh !important;
    min-height: 0 !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .app-shell {
    height: 100vh !important;
    max-height: 100vh !important;
    min-height: 0 !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .main-content {
    height: 100vh !important;
    max-height: 100vh !important;
    min-height: 0 !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
    padding: 6px 0 !important;
    display: grid !important;
    grid-template-rows: 120px 62px minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
    gap: 6px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .footer {
    display: none !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .hero-header {
    margin: 0 14px !important;
    height: 120px !important;
    min-height: 0 !important;
    max-height: 120px !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
    border-radius: 13px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .hero-main {
    height: 100% !important;
    padding: 10px 18px !important;
    gap: 12px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .hero-icon {
    width: 58px !important;
    height: 58px !important;
    border-radius: 14px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .hero-icon svg {
    width: 36px !important;
    height: 36px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .hero-title-block h1 {
    font-size: 36px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .hero-title-block p {
    margin-top: 5px !important;
    font-size: 12px !important;
    line-height: 1.25 !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .host-text {
    margin-top: 5px !important;
    font-size: 11px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .hero-actions {
    top: 10px !important;
    right: 14px !important;
    gap: 6px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .update-card {
    min-width: 230px !important;
    padding: 7px 10px !important;
    gap: 8px !important;
    border-radius: 10px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .filters-panel {
    margin: 0 14px !important;
    height: 62px !important;
    max-height: 62px !important;
    min-height: 0 !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
    padding: 7px 10px !important;
    border-radius: 12px !important;
    display: grid !important;
    grid-template-columns: 110px minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
    align-items: center !important;
    gap: 10px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .section-title {
    margin-bottom: 0 !important;
    gap: 6px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .filters-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(120px, 1fr)) 140px !important;
    gap: 7px !important;
    align-items: end !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .filter-box label {
    margin-bottom: 3px !important;
    font-size: 9.5px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .filter-box select,
  html.fullscreen-layout .reset-button {
    height: 32px !important;
    font-size: 11px !important;
    border-radius: 8px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .reset-button {
    grid-column: auto !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .dashboard-view.active-view {
    min-height: 0 !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .panel {
    height: 100% !important;
    max-height: 100% !important;
    min-height: 0 !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
    padding: 10px !important;
    border-radius: 12px !important;
    display: flex !important;
    flex-direction: column !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .panel-header {
    flex: 0 0 auto !important;
    margin-bottom: 5px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .panel-header h3 {
    font-size: 13px !important;
    line-height: 1.15 !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .panel-header p {
    margin-top: 2px !important;
    font-size: 10px !important;
    line-height: 1.15 !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .panel canvas {
    flex: 1 1 auto !important;
    min-height: 0 !important;
    height: calc(100% - 34px) !important;
    max-height: calc(100% - 34px) !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout .table-wrapper,
  html.fullscreen-layout .selection-table-wrapper {
    flex: 1 1 auto !important;
    min-height: 0 !important;
    max-height: none !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
    margin-top: 5px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout table {
    font-size: 10px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout th {
    padding: 4px 6px !important;
    font-size: 9.5px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout td {
    padding: 4px 6px !important;
    font-size: 10px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout #view-resumen.dashboard-view.active-view {
    display: grid !important;
    grid-template-rows: 70px minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
    gap: 6px !important;
    height: 100% !important;
    max-height: 100% !important;
    margin: 0 14px !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout #view-resumen .kpi-strip,
  html.fullscreen-layout #view-resumen .dashboard-grid {
    margin: 0 !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout #view-resumen .kpi-strip {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(8, minmax(100px, 1fr)) !important;
    gap: 6px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout #view-resumen .kpi-card {
    height: 100% !important;
    min-height: 0 !important;
    padding: 7px 8px !important;
    gap: 7px !important;
    border-radius: 10px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout #view-resumen .kpi-icon {
    width: 30px !important;
    height: 30px !important;
    border-radius: 8px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout #view-resumen .kpi-icon svg {
    width: 18px !important;
    height: 18px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout #view-resumen .kpi-card p {
    font-size: 9.5px !important;
    line-height: 1.05 !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout #view-resumen .kpi-card h2 {
    margin: 3px 0 1px !important;
    font-size: 22px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout #view-resumen .kpi-card small {
    font-size: 8.8px !important;
    line-height: 1.05 !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout #view-resumen .top-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
    gap: 6px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout #view-resumen .bottom-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.25fr 1fr !important;
    gap: 6px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout #view-selecciones.dashboard-view.active-view {
    display: grid !important;
    grid-template-rows:
      minmax(58px, 0.55fr)
      minmax(60px, 0.58fr)
      minmax(50px, 0.48fr)
      minmax(0, 1.12fr)
      minmax(0, 0.98fr) !important;
    gap: 6px !important;
    height: 100% !important;
    max-height: 100% !important;
    margin: 0 14px !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }
}

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .hero-header,

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-full-board,

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-board-legend,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-board-legend {

  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-tournament-layout,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-tournament-layout {
    height: 100% !important;
    min-height: 0 !important;

  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-groups-side,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-groups-side {

  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-bracket-full-area,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-bracket-full-area {
    height: 100% !important;
    min-height: 0 !important;
    grid-template-rows: minmax(0, 1fr) 46px !important;
    gap: 6px !important;

  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-bracket-full,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-bracket-full {
    height: 100% !important;
    min-height: 0 !important;
    max-height: 100% !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
    padding: 7px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-board,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-board {
    min-width: 0 !important;
    width: 100% !important;

    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 205px minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
    gap: 9px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-side,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-side {

  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-side-title,
  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-center-title,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-side-title,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-center-title {
    height: 20px !important;
    border-radius: 7px !important;
    font-size: 7.2px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-labels,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-labels {

  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-labels span,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-labels span {

  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-grid,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-grid {

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-match-node,

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .tree-match-r32,

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-match-node-meta,

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-node-team,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-node-team {

    padding: 1px 2px !important;

    border-radius: 5px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-node-flag,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-node-flag {
    font-size: 8.5px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-node-name,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-node-name {

  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-node-seed,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-node-seed {

  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-node-score,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-node-score {

  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .match-node-winner,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .match-node-winner {

  }

  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .match-node-winner strong,

  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-center,

    grid-template-rows: 20px minmax(0, 1fr) !important;

  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-final-stack,

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-champion-box h3,

  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-champion-box small,

  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-full-note,

   FULLSCREEN PANTALLAS BAJAS
====================================================== */
@media (max-height: 820px) and (min-width: 1200px) {
  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-full-tournament-view,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-full-tournament-view {
    grid-template-rows: 46px minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
    gap: 5px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-full-header,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-full-header {
    height: 46px !important;
    min-height: 46px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-full-title h2,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-full-title h2 {
    font-size: 19px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-full-title p,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-full-title p,
  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-full-run-card,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-full-run-card {
    display: none !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-full-board,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .prediction-full-board {
    grid-template-rows: 24px minmax(0, 1fr) 24px !important;

  }

  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-board,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .bracket-tree-board {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 180px minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
    gap: 6px !important;
  }

  html.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .match-node-winner,
  body.fullscreen-layout.prediction-mode .match-node-winner {
    display: none !important;
  }
}

/* =====================================================
   CONFIGURACIÓN DEFINITIVA
   - Unifica Predicción inicial y Predicción viva.
   - Mantiene el mismo sidebar en todos los tabs.
   - Vista normal: grupos arriba y llave con scroll horizontal.
   - Fullscreen: grupos laterales, llave completa y sidebar retráctil.
====================================================== */

/* ---------- SIDEBAR UNIFICADO ---------- */
.sidebar,
body.prediction-mode .sidebar {
  position: fixed !important;
  inset: 0 auto 0 0 !important;
  width: var(--sidebar-width) !important;
  min-width: var(--sidebar-width) !important;
  max-width: var(--sidebar-width) !important;
  height: 100vh !important;
  min-height: 100vh !important;
